---
title: "test_metrics_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_metrics_empire.py"
loc: 46
complexity: 3
logic_score: 6.47
style_score: 3.66
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.22
---

## Intent
The `test_metrics_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestProjectMetricsEngine, test_compute_score, exists_side_effect, test_radon_failure. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestProjectMetricsEngine, test_compute_score, exists_side_effect, test_radon_failure. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.core.metrics](file://src.core.metrics)

### Exports
- `TestProjectMetricsEngine`
- `test_compute_score`
- `exists_side_effect`
- `test_radon_failure`
